title: Valve, the Anticorporate Hero of the Games Industry, Has Its Antitrust Moment
description: Lawsuits in the US and the UK allege the company’s Steam store is abusing its market power. Valve disagrees.

title: GameStop Posted Its Highest Profit Ever By Selling Action Figures and Cards
description: GameStop Corp. shares climbed as much as 13% in after-hours trading after the video-game retailer reported a record quarterly profit driven by its collectibles business.

title: Back On Being Bitcoin Creator: 'Hard to Prove Negative'
description: Adam Back, co-founder and CEO of Blockstream, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Back is often considered to be the creator of Bitcoin, which he has repeatedly denied. (Source: Bloomberg)
